positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. (chemical_compound(mixture) & contains_only_one_element(mixture)) | (~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)) [input(axiom)]
7. ~(alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~(alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture)) [negated conjecture 7]
9. alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture) [flattening 8]
10. alkane(mixture) [pure predicate removal 9]
12. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
13. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
14. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
15. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
16. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
17. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
18. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
19. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
21. contains_only_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture) [cnf transformation 6]
24. alkane(mixture) [cnf transformation 10]
26. 1 <=> chemical_compound(mixture) [avatar definition]
27. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (1) [avatar component clause 26]
28. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (~1) [avatar component clause 26]
30. 2 <=> contains_only_one_element(mixture) [avatar definition]
32. contains_only_one_element(mixture) <- (2) [avatar component clause 30]
33. ~1 | 2 [avatar split clause 21,30,26]
35. hydrocarbon(mixture) [resolution 17,24]
36. organic_compound(mixture) [resolution 35,16]
37. chemical_compound(mixture) [resolution 36,18]
38. $false <- (~1) [forward subsumption resolution 37,28]
39. 1 [avatar contradiction clause 38]
40. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (2) [resolution 32,19]
41. $false <- (1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 40,27]
42. ~1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 41]
s1. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 33]
s3. 1 [sat_conversion 39]
s4. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 42]
s5. ~2 [rat s4,s3]
s6. # [rat s1,s5,s3]
43. $false [avatar sat refutation s6]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
